vehicle.label: Long-Range Surveillance Wing
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing flying-wing UAV, 2m wingspan, 4+ hour endurance

parts.label: Center Body Pod
parts.spec: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

parts.label: Wing Rib Set x 12
parts.spec: Wing rib NACA airfoil profile, lightening pockets, leading edge sock, trailing edge taper

parts.label: Elevon Servo Pocket x 2
parts.spec: Elevon servo pocket, MG90S or DS215MG, control horn linkage, removable access cover

parts.label: Motor + Pusher Prop Mount
parts.spec: Rear pusher 2814 BLDC mount, 10x7 folding prop clearance, thrust line +1deg down

parts.label: GPS + Pitot Boom
parts.spec: Nose boom 8mm, GPS at tip, pitot static port forward, BEC airflow shielded

parts.label: Camera Gimbal Bay

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide)
parts.spec: 4S 16000mAh Li-ion slide-in bay, CG adjust slot, top access hatch, balance lead window

parts.label: Integration Service Backbone

risk.desc: Potential access issues for equipment bay door.
risk.mit: Design additional access windows or larger door.

risk.desc: Insufficient engagement depth for threaded connections.
risk.mit: Use inserts or bosses for adequate engagement.

risk.desc: Risk of dust ingress through cooling inlet.
risk.mit: Design filter or seal around cooling inlet.

risk.desc: Risk of over-torque during fastener installation.
risk.mit: Include torque limiters or torque wrenches.

risk.desc: Risk of thermal stress due to temperature extremes.
risk.mit: Use thermally stable materials or design for thermal expansion.

20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each
4+ hour endurance agricultural survey, multispectral sensor bay, low-altitude dust tolerance

verify.value: All required features and interfaces are present and labeled.
verify.rule: All required evidence_features must appear in part_tree/geometry_ops.
cad_brief.mass_est_g must be a numeric grams value.

verify.value: All P0 internal_feature_targets are present in geometry_ops.
verify.rule: P0 internal_feature_targets must appear as part_tree children and geometry_ops ids or targets.

verify.value: All interfaces are named with exact neighboring subsystem labels and connection_type, DOF, clearance_mm, and required_feature.
verify.rule: Name exact neighboring subsystem labels when they mate, and choose connection_type + DOF + clearance_mm + required_feature.

verify.value: Visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent for critical joints.
verify.rule: Critical joints need visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent.
verify must include a boundary_conditions object with fixture_points, thermal_zones, and pressure_faces.

risk.desc: Potential for thermal expansion to affect joint integrity.
risk.mit: Design with thermal expansion in mind, using expansion joints or flexible materials.

risk.desc: Risk of over-tightening fasteners leading to material failure.
risk.mit: Specify torque limits and use torque wrenches during assembly.

risk.desc: Possibility of inadequate clearance for moving parts.
risk.mit: Ensure all moving parts have sufficient clearance and are designed with standard fits.

risk.desc: Risk of misalignment due to manufacturing tolerances.
risk.mit: Implement strict manufacturing tolerances and perform alignment checks post-assembly.

risk.desc: Potential for corrosion in humid environments.
risk.mit: Use corrosion-resistant materials and coatings.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Main spar, ribs, carry-through, fuselage frames; continuous load path

physics_paths.description: Transfers wing bending and servo loads from root to tip
Carries structural loads from battery to sensor bay
Dissipates heat from sun exposure to wing root
Supports wing flap motion from wing root to tip
Transfers sensor data from sensor bay to flight control system

manufacturing_strategy.datum: Primary locating faces, rail guides, axis rings, spar sockets, or mating pads

generated_parts.label: Wing Rib Set x 12

verify.value: All required fields are present and valid.
verify.rule: Ensure all schema fields are filled and correct.
Ensure the mass budget is within the acceptable range.

verify.value: All P0 internal_feature_targets are present as part_tree children and geometry_ops ids or targets.
verify.rule: Ensure P0 internal_feature_targets are accurately reflected in the geometry.

verify.value: All interfaces have matching connection_type, DOF, clearance_mm, and required_feature in adjacent parts.
verify.rule: Ensure interfaces are reciprocal between mating parts.

verify.value: Visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence for critical joints.
verify.rule: Ensure critical joints have visible locking/preload evidence.
Ensure boundary conditions are defined for downstream CFD/FEA.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment of spar socket with spar module due to manufacturing tolerances.
risk.mit: Implement tighter manufacturing tolerances and visual inspection.

risk.desc: Leading edge sock may not fit properly due to dimensional variations.
risk.mit: Use a snap fit with a tolerance of LC2 and perform visual inspection.

risk.desc: Trailing edge band clamp may not secure properly due to dimensional variations.
risk.mit: Use a band clamp with a tolerance of LC3 and perform visual inspection.

risk.desc: Lightening pockets may not provide sufficient weight reduction due to design constraints.
risk.mit: Optimize the design of lightening pockets to maximize weight reduction.

risk.desc: Control surface movement around hinge line may be restricted due to design constraints.
risk.mit: Ensure the hinge line is properly designed to allow smooth movement of the control surface.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Wing planform, airfoil section evidence, winglets, elevon/control surface cutouts with hinges

physics_paths.description: Transfer wing bending loads from spar to leading edge
Airflow through lightening pockets for weight reduction
Heat dissipation from sun-exposed wing skin
Control surface movement around hinge line
Data transmission from sensor module to central data hub
Access for maintenance and service

verification_focus.name: spar_socket_alignment
verification_focus.description: Ensure spar socket is correctly aligned with spar module

verification_focus.name: leading_edge_fit
verification_focus.description: Check snap fit of leading edge sock to wing skin

verification_focus.name: trailing_edge_band_clamp
verification_focus.description: Verify band clamp on trailing edge taper

risk.mit: Review and refine access points during design review.

risk.mit: Conduct a detailed process capability analysis before finalizing the design.

risk.mit: Add inspection access points during design phase.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: rear pusher motor mount with prop clearance and cooling path

physics_paths.description: Thrust from motor and propeller is transferred to the wing structure via mounting bolts
Cooling air flows through the inlet and over the motor to dissipate heat
Heat from the motor is dissipated to the environment through the cooling inlet
Electrical power and control signals are routed from the battery to the motor
Field service personnel can access the motor for maintenance or replacement

adjacent_interfaces.assembly_order_hint: install motor mount after wing structure
mate power distribution board after motor mount

propeller clearance must allow full rotation
harness path must allow full electrical connection

risk.mit: Implement thermal insulation around the GPS mount.

risk.mit: Increase the separation between power and signal lines.
